1997June 1, 1997

🇺🇸 San Diego, CA, USA

Resolutions of the plenary meeting of ISO/TC 184/SC 4, San Diego, United States, June 1, 1997 -- June 11, 1997

Meeting URNurn:iso:tc:184:sc:4:meeting:plenary-1997-06-san-diego-ca-usa

29 Resolutions

338Plenary
Thank US PRO sponsor
SC 4 thanks its United States US PRO sponsor. Particular thanks go to Melanie Ridenhour, Erinbeth Massie, Kristi Adams, Susan Gilley, and Chuck Stark.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
337Plenary
Create ad hoc group "Shared Enterprise Data"
SC 4 creates an ad hoc group "Shared Enterprise Data" to: * Review the developments in other standards organisations related to data modelling and standardisation of enterprise information * Establ...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
336Plenary
Establish ad-hoc Requirements Team to update SC 4 documentation
SC 4 establishes an ad-hoc Requirements Team to update the SC 4 documentation on the industry requirements for SC 4 standards and the terminology for describing these requirements. This work will b...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
335Plenary
Approve changes to Abstract Test Suite Guidelines
SC 4 approves the changes to the Abstract Test Suite Guidelines, SC 4 N 536, and requests the SC 4 Secretariat take appropriate action to publish and disseminate this SC 4 Standing Document to the ...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
334Plenary
Request WG 12 to produce consensus-built revisions to 10303-41, 43, 44
SC 4 requests WG 12 to produce consensus-built documents of revisions to 10303- 41, 43, and 44 to be completed and into Quality Committee for qualification no later than 1997-08-15. Quality Committ...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
333Plenary
Approve Greg Paul as Convener of WG 12
SC 4 approves Greg Paul as Convener of WG 12, SC 4 Common Resources.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
332Plenary
Thank Phillip Kennicott for his service
SC 4 thanks Phillip Kennicott for his dedicated service and technical contributions to the work of ISO/TC 184/SC 4, and wishes him well in his new endeavors.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
331Plenary
Accept QC/WG 11 proposal on ATS coverage and approve metrics
SC 4 accepts the QC/WG 11 proposal to limit coverage requirements to Application Objects and to leave to the ATS developers the choice of selecting which combinations of attributes and assertions a...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
330Plenary
Cancel project 10303-33 for conformance testing methodology
SC 4 cancels project #7, 10303-33, Conformance testing methodology and framework: Structure and use of abstract test suites.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
329Plenary
Approve preliminary work item on SC 4 Data Architecture
SC 4 approves the Preliminary Work Item on the SC 4 Data Architecture described in document WG 10 N113 and appoints Matthew West as Project Leader. This project is assigned to WG 10.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
328Plenary
Approve preliminary work item on SGML and industrial data
SC 4 approves the Preliminary Work Item on SGML and industrial data described in document WG 10 N114, as well as in WG 10 N118 attachment 1, and appoints Nigel Shaw and Daniel Rivers-Moore as joint...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
327Plenary
Approve preliminary work item for ISO 10303-1 amendment and create editing committee
SC 4 approves a Preliminary Work Item to define the amendment to ISO 10303-1 by May 1998 and appoints Howard Mason as Project Leader.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
326Plenary
Cancel SC 4 Project 114 (ISO 10303-1 Amendment)
SC 4 cancels SC 4 Project #114, ISO 10303-1 Amendment, "Overview and fundamental principles".
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
325Plenary
Endorse continued ISO leadership of JWG 9 standards
SC 4 endorses continued ISO leadership of all the JWG 9 standards, and requests its secretary to forward this endorsement to ISO for the ISO Technical Management Board and IEC Committee of Action a...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
324Plenary
Approve preliminary work items for Process planning of layered electronic products
SC 4 approves "Application protocol: Process planning, manufacture, and assembly of layered electronic products" and "Abstract test suite: Process planning, manufacture, and assembly of layered ele...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
323Plenary
Cancel SC 4 Project 62 (ISO 10303-220) and associated ATS
SC 4 cancels SC 4 Project #62 as New Work Item: ISO 10303-220, "Application protocol: Process planning, manufacture, and assembly of layered electronic products" and its associated abstract test su...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
322Plenary
Support MANDATE projects under ISO 15531 and request ballot distribution
SC 4 supports the concept of all three MANDATE projects under the new work item, ISO 15531, and requests its Secretary to distribute to its P-members, a second CD ballot of 15531-31 along with the ...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
321Plenary
Authorize preparatory work on product life-cycle support
SC 4 authorizes preparatory (stage 0) work on product life-cycle support, to develop a high-level planning model and if appropriate to formulate NWI proposals by October 1997. John Dunford and Rick...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
320Plenary
Authorize preliminary work item to develop a NODIF AP
SC 4 authorizes a new Preliminary Work Item (stage 0) to develop a NODIF AP and appoints Timothy Wise as project leader.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
319Plenary
Approve preliminary work items for Building services HVAC
SC 4 approves "Application protocol: Building services: Heating, ventilation, and air conditioning" and "Abstract test suite: Building services: Heating, ventilation, and air conditioning" as preli...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
318Plenary
Cancel SC 4 Project 102 (ISO 10303-228) and associated ATS
SC 4 cancels SC 4 Project #102 as New Work Item: (San Diego, CA USA - June 1997) ISO 10303-228, "Application protocol: Building services: Heating, ventilation, and air conditioning", and it's assoc...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
317Plenary
Accept IAI request for A-liaison and approve liaisons
SC 4 accepts the Industry Alliance for Interoperability's (IAI) request for A-liaison status to SC 4, and recognizes Jeffrey Wix as the person to actively liaise from IAI to SC 4.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
316Plenary
Request active liaison with ISO/TC 29/WG 34 and approve liaisons
SC 4 requests an active liaison with ISO/TC 29/WG 34, "Small tools: Computerized machining data exchange", and requests the SC 4 Secretary confirm this liaison with ISO Central Secretariat and requ...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
315Plenary
Request establishment of liaison with ISO/TC 213 and approve Alan Jones
SC 4 requests its Secretary to establish an active two-way liaison with ISO/TC 213, "Dimensional and geometrical product specification and verification", and approves Mr. Alan Jones as the person t...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
314Plenary
Appoint Bernd Wenzel as liaison to ISO/TC 211
SC 4 appoints Mr. Bernd Wenzel as the person to actively liaise on behalf of SC 4 to ISO/TC 211.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
313Plenary
Approve inclusions in SC 4 Organization Handbook for Liaisons
SC 4 approves the following be included in the SC 4 Organization Handbook under Clause 5.5 (reference ISO/TC 184 SC 4 N 492): 5.5.1 SC 4 Policy for all Liaisons
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
312Plenary
Support working group representation at ISO/IEC JTC 1 Joint Workshop on Metadata
SC 4 supports working group representation at the ISO/IEC JTC 1 Joint Workshop on Registration of Metadata and requests the following delegates to attend: * WG 2: Guy Pierra * WG 10: Julian Fowler ...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
311Plenary
Approve project leaders and editors for SC 4 projects
SC 4 approves the following new project leaders and/or project editors for the associated SC 4 projects: |=== |ISO Project |Project Lead |Document Editor |Java programming language |Lisa McCabe | |...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
Acclamation
Acclamation
SC 4 wishes to thank Ms. Barbara Warthen for her liaison role with ISO/TC 211, and accepts her resignation from this position.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
ISO/TC 184/SC 4

Industrial data

Standardization of the content, meaning, structure, representation and quality management of information for engineered products throughout their lifecycle.

Committee

  • Secretariat: ANSI (Secretariat)
  • Chair: Kenneth Swope
  • Established: 1984
  • Standards: 822 published
  • Members: 21 (P), 14 (O)
